calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Feb-26-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, Esq.
Gary A. Rosenberg, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Premium Capital LLC as assignee of the Hartford.
Mr. Rosenberg informed the Court that plaintiff's witness, Jennifer Whitcomb, was unable to attend this morning's hearing due to extreme weather conditions in New Haven, Connnecticut.
No appearance defendant IP&R Inventors' Publishing & Research, LLC, a California Limited Liability Company.
Default entered against defendant - 12/18/07.
Doe Defendants dismissed - 12/18/07.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Premium Capital LLC as assignee of the Hartford, and against the Defaulted Defendant IP&R Inventors' Publishing & Research, LLC, a California Limited Liability Company, as follows:

Damages/Principal $28,309.04.
Prejudgment Interest $5,351.57.
Attorney's Fees $1,239.27.
Costs $383.75, for a total of $35,283.63.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
